name: HVB Electric Control Butterfly Valve
desc: Quarter-turn electric butterfly valve for high-volume flow control in industrial and building systems.
overview: The HVB series covers both electric butterfly valves (DN50–DN500) and electric ball valves (DN15–DN300), driven by quarter-turn electric actuators. Dual mechanical and electronic limit protection ensures safe operation. Supports 4-20mA, RS485 and M-Bus for integration with any BMS or SCADA system.

specs.label: Applicable media
specs.value: Cold water, hot water, ethylene glycol solution ≤50%, some refrigerants

features: Compact design with large flow capacity (high Cv value), space-saving for large-diameter pipelines
High adjustment accuracy with fast response, meeting precise process parameter control requirements
Strong adaptability to high-temperature, high-pressure, and corrosive media; hard-sealed version for steam/hot water
Straight-through flow design: pressure loss coefficient ≤0.5, much lower than ball valves
Full-travel response time 3–10 seconds for fast and precise control
W-body design filters particles and fibers, suitable for special media like paper pulp (slurry)
Smart protection: dual limit switch (mechanical + electronic), over-temperature/over-pressure alarm, auto parameter setting
Long service life: small contact area between ball and seat reduces friction and corrosion
